name: OAuth Abuse / Malicious App Consent Actors
description: OAuth Abuse and Malicious App Consent Actors are threat actors who gain access by tricking users or administrators into authorizing malicious applications within trusted identity platforms such as Microsoft 365, Okta, Google Workspace, and Entra ID.
